name: Prize Model
author: Exergy ∞ LLC

entities.name: prize
entities.description:
Represents a scientific prize or award (e.g., Nobel Prize in Physics, Kyoto Prize).
Prizes are awarded to people and/or theories for significant contributions to science.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the prize (e.g., 'Nobel Prize in Physics', 'Kyoto Prize in Basic Sciences')

enum: Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of what the prize recognizes

entities.name: prize_award
entities.brief: An award of a prize to a person or theory
entities.description:
Represents the awarding of a prize in a specific year to one or more people and/or theories.
Links prizes to recipients (people and/or theories) with the year and description of the award.

fields.name: prize_id
fields.description: Reference to the prize being awarded

fields.name: year
fields.description: Year when the prize was awarded (four-digit calendar year; omit if unknown)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of why the prize was awarded (e.g., citation text)

fields.name: people
fields.description: Array of person_ids who received this award

fields.name: theory_id
fields.description: Reference to theory for which the prize was awarded (if applicable)

description: Prize and prize-award entities for scientific awards linked to people and theories.
